title: Combination Sum
input_format: An array of distinct integers `candidates` and a target integer `target`.
output_format: A list of all unique combinations of candidates where the chosen numbers sum to target.
constraints:
- `1 <= candidates.length <= 30`
- `2 <= candidates[i] <= 40`
- All elements of `candidates` are distinct.
- `1 <= target <= 40`
function_signature: function combinationSum(candidates: number[], target: number): number[][] {}
